$comment: Validation uses standard JSON Schema. Before validating, Firefox normalizes platform input in PolicySchemaValidator.sys.mjs: a value delivered as a JSON string is parsed where contentMediaType is application/json, and 0/1 integers become booleans. After validation, strings with format uri become URL objects, and a list entry that fails validation is dropped and logged rather than discarding the whole policy.

AIChatbot.description: Controls access to AI chat services. The built-in providers are Anthropic Claude, ChatGPT, Copilot, Google Gemini, HuggingChat, Le Chat Mistral, and a locally running AI chatbot. These can be enabled individually. For custom providers, add them to the 'Add' array. The 'Default' field specifies which provider is used by default.

AIControls.description: Controls access to AI features: Translations, PDF alt text generation, smart tab groups, display summaries in link previews, AI chatbot in the sidebar and smart windows. The `Default` value applies to all AI features, unless overridden by a specific feature.

AllowedDomainsForApps.description: Define domains allowed to access Google Workspace.

AllowFileSelectionDialogs.description: Enable or disable file selection dialogs.

AppUpdatePin.description: Prevent Firefox from being updated beyond the specified version.

AppUpdateURL.description: Change the URL for application update if you are providing Firefox updates from a custom update server.

Authentication.description: Configure sites that support integrated authentication.

AutofillAddressEnabled.description: Enables or disables autofill for addresses.

AutofillCreditCardEnabled.description: Enables or disables autofill for payment methods.

AutoLaunchProtocolsFromOrigins.description: Define a list of external protocols that can be used from listed origins without prompting the user.

BackgroundAppUpdate.description: Enable or disable automatic application update in the background, when the application is not running.

BlockAboutAddons.description: Block access to the Add-ons Manager ('about:addons').

BlocklistDomainBrowsedTelemetry.description: Enable and configure security logging/telemetry when Firefox blocks a visit to a blocklisted domain.

Bookmarks.description: Add bookmarks in either the bookmarks toolbar or menu. Use 'ManagedBookmarks' instead.

BrowserDataBackup.description: Disable backup or restore of profile data.

CaptivePortal.description: Enable or disable the detection of captive portals.

Containers.description: Set policies related to Multi-Account Containers.

ContentAnalysis.description: Configure Firefox to use an agent for Data Loss Prevention (DLP) that is compatible with the Google Chrome Content Analysis Connector Agent SDK.

DisableAppUpdate.description: Turn off application updates within Firefox.

DisableBuiltinPDFViewer.description: Disable the built in PDF viewer.

DisabledCiphers.description: Disable specific cryptographic ciphers, listed below.

DisableDefaultBrowserAgent.description: Prevent the default browser agent from taking any actions.

DisableDeveloperTools.description: Remove access to all developer tools.

DisableEncryptedClientHello.description: Disable the TLS Feature for Encrypted Client Hello.

DisableFeedbackCommands.description: Disable the menus for reporting sites (Submit Feedback, Report Deceptive Site).

DisableFormHistory.description: Turn off saving information on web forms and the search bar.

DisablePasswordReveal.description: Do not allow passwords to be shown in saved logins

DisablePocket.description: Remove Pocket in the Firefox UI.

DisableProfileImport.description: Remove the ability to import data from other browsers.

DisableProfileRefresh.description: Disable the Refresh Firefox button on 'about:support' and 'support.mozilla.org', as well as the prompt that displays offering to refresh Firefox when you haven't used it in a while.

DisableRemoteImprovements.description: Prevent Firefox from applying performance, stability, and feature changes between updates.

DisableSafeMode.description: Disable safe mode (Troubleshoot Mode) within the browser.

DisableSecurityBypass.description: Prevent the user from bypassing security in certain cases.

DisableSetDesktopBackground.description: 'Remove the "Set As Desktop Background..." menuitem when right clicking on an image.'

DisableSystemAddonUpdate.description: Prevent system add-ons from being installed or updated.

DisableTelemetry.description: Prevent the upload of telemetry data.

DisableThirdPartyModuleBlocking.description: Do not allow blocking third-party modules from the 'about:third-party' page.

DisplayBookmarksToolbar.description: Set the initial state of the bookmarks toolbar.

DisplayMenuBar.description: Set the state of the menubar.

DontCheckDefaultBrowser.description: Don't check if Firefox is the default browser at startup.

DownloadDirectory.description: Set and lock the download directory.

EncryptedMediaExtensions.description: Enable or disable Encrypted Media Extensions and optionally lock it.

ExemptDomainFileTypePairsFromFileTypeDow.description: Disable warnings based on file extension for specific file types on domains.

Extensions.description: Control the installation, uninstallation and locking of extensions.

GoToIntranetSiteForSingleWordEntryInAddr.description: Whether to always go through the DNS server before sending a single word search string to a search engine.

Homepage.description: Configure the default homepage and how Firefox starts.

HttpAllowlist.description: Configure sites that will not be upgraded to HTTPS.

InstallAddonsPermission.description: Configure the default extension install policy as well as origins for extension installs are allowed.

LegacyProfiles.description: Disable the feature enforcing a separate profile for each installation.

LegacySameSiteCookieBehaviorEnabled.description: Enable default legacy SameSite cookie behavior setting.

LegacySameSiteCookieBehaviorEnabledForDo.description: Revert to legacy SameSite behavior for cookies on specified sites.

LocalFileLinks.description: Enable linking to local files by origin.

LocalNetworkAccess.description: Configure local network access security features.

ManagedBookmarks.description: Configures a list of bookmarks managed by an administrator that cannot be changed by the user.

MicrosoftEntraSSO.description: Allow single sign-on for Microsoft Entra accounts on macOS.

NetworkPrediction.description: Enable or disable network prediction (DNS prefetching).

NewTabPage.description: Enable or disable the New Tab page.

NoDefaultBookmarks.description: Disable the creation of default bookmarks.

OfferToSaveLogins.description: Control whether or not Firefox offers to save passwords.

OfferToSaveLoginsDefault.description: Sets the default value of 'signon.rememberSignons' without locking it.

PasswordManagerEnabled.description: Remove access to the password manager via preferences and blocks about:logins on Firefox 70.

PasswordManagerExceptions.description: Prevent Firefox from saving passwords for specific sites.

PDFjs.description: Disable or configure PDF.js, the built-in PDF viewer.

Permissions.description: Set permissions associated with camera, microphone, location, notifications, autoplay, and virtual reality.

PictureInPicture.description: Enable or disable Picture-in-Picture as well as prevent the user from enabling or disabling it (Locked).

PopupBlocking.description: Allow certain websites to display popups and be redirected by third-party frames.

PostQuantumKeyAgreementEnabled.description: Enable post-quantum key agreement for TLS.

PrimaryPassword.description: Require or prevent using a primary (formerly master) password.

PrivateBrowsingModeAvailability.description: Set availability of private browsing mode.

PromptForDownloadLocation.description: Ask where to save each file before downloading.

RequestedLocales.description: Set the the list of requested locales for the application in order of preference.

SanitizeOnShutdown.description: Clear specified data on shutdown, such as History, Cookies, Logins, Cache, Form History, Site Preferences and Offline Website Data.

SearchBar.description: Set whether or not search bar is displayed.

SearchEngines.description: The following policies allow for configuring search engines in Firefox.

PreventInstalls.description: Prevent installing search engines from webpages.

ShowHomeButton.description: Show the home button on the toolbar.

SitePolicies.description: Fine grained control over policies for specific sites.

SkipTermsOfUse.description: Configure display settings for the Firefox Terms of Use and Privacy Notice on startup.

SSLVersionMax.description: Set and lock the maximum version of TLS.

SSLVersionMin.description: Set and lock the minimum version of TLS.

StartDownloadsInTempDirectory.description: Force downloads to start off in a local, temporary location rather than the default download directory.

SupportMenu.description: Add a menuitem to the help menu for specifying support information.

Sync.description: Enable or disable sync and define which data to include.

UserMessaging.description: Prevent Firefox from messaging the user in certain situations.

UseSystemPrintDialog.description: Use the system print dialog instead of the print preview window.

WindowsSSO.description: Allow Windows single sign-on for Microsoft, work, and school accounts.

XSLTEnabled.description: Enable or disable support for the XSLTProcessor JavaScript API and the XSLT processing instruction.
